summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Collections feature for movie file scanner. Backend API fully functional, frontend Collections page working perfectly, URL-based filtering operational.

ui_bugs.issue: Movie modal not opening when clicking on movie cards in library
ui_bugs.note: This appears to be unrelated to Collections feature - affects general movie modal functionality

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test Collections dropdown in movie modal due to modal not opening
integration_issues.note: Collections button exists in modal code but modal interaction is broken

passed_tests: Collections API - All CRUD operations (POST, GET, PUT, DELETE /api/collections)
Collections API - Add/remove movies to/from collections endpoints
Collections API - Stats endpoint includes total_collections count
Create collection dialog with name, description, and color picker
Collection card navigation to filtered library
Library page shows collection filter banner when ?collection=xxx
URL parameter collection filtering works correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 54 tests passed including Collections API
success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Collections feature working, movie modal issue unrelated to Collections

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix movie modal opening issue - movie cards in library are not clickable/not opening modal. This affects the ability to test Collections dropdown integration in movie modal, but Collections feature itself is fully functional.
